R Notebook

library(tidyverse)
library(marginaleffects)
library(fixest)
library(gam)
library(splines)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(gridExtra)
library(useful)
library(purrr)
library(patchwork)
library(rms)
library(tidycensus)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(did)
library(haven)
library(bea.R)
library(lpdid)
library(DIDmultiplegtDYN)
library(ggpattern)
library(countrycode)
library(stringr)
library(ggpattern)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggpubr)
library(splp)
library(MatchIt)
library(cobalt)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
setFixest_notes(FALSE)
source("../emileRegs.R")

Data

myblue  = "#1f78b4"   # blue
myred  = "#e31a1c"
myyellow = "orange"  # orange
myblack = "black"  # light blue
mygreen = "forestgreen"  # green
# Also load full panel for comparison
pwt  <- read_stata("../raw_data/pwt_clean.dta")
tcs  <- read_stata("../raw_data/ibtracs_clean.dta")
data_full <- pwt %>% left_join(tcs, by = c("year", "countrycode"))

knot_to_ms <- 0.514444
data <- data_full %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind  = replace_na(max_ann_wind_i_nob, 0) * knot_to_ms,
    energy  = replace_na(sum_ann_energy_i_nob, 0),
    nlands  = replace_na(sum_a_lands_nob, 0),
    loggdp   = ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    gdp_diff = growth_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    year2    = year^2,
    period   = ifelse(year <= 1990, "Pre-1990", "Post-1990")
  ) %>%
  filter(year >= 1969) %>%
mutate(
  maxwind_p95 = quantile(maxwind[maxwind > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
  maxwind_95  = as.integer(maxwind_p95 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p95),

  maxwind_p99 = quantile(maxwind[maxwind > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
  maxwind_99  = as.integer(maxwind_p99 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p99),

  cat1_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 32.7),
  cat2_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 49.4),
  cat3_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 70.0),

  energy_p95 = quantile(energy[energy > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
  nlands_p95 = quantile(nlands[nlands > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),

  energy_95 = as.integer(energy_p95 > 0 & energy >= energy_p95),
  nlands_95 = as.integer(nlands_p95 > 0 & nlands >= nlands_p95),

  energy_p99 = quantile(energy[energy > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
  nlands_p99 = quantile(nlands[nlands > 0 & year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),

  energy_99 = as.integer(energy_p99 > 0 & energy >= energy_p99),
  nlands_99 = as.integer(nlands_p99 > 0 & nlands >= nlands_p99),

  region = countrycode(countrycode, "iso3c", "region"),
  region = ifelse(is.na(region), "Other", region),

  continent = countrycode(countrycode, "iso3c", "continent"),
  continent = ifelse(is.na(continent), "Other", continent)
)

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind_sd = maxwind / sd(maxwind[maxwind > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_sd  = energy  / sd(energy[energy > 0],   na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_sd  = nlands  / sd(nlands[nlands > 0],   na.rm = TRUE)
  )

Maps

data_tc_filtered <- data %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(max(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE) > 0 | max(nlands, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) %>%
  ungroup()


ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc_filtered %>%
        group_by(countrycode) %>%
        summarise(mean_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("adm0_a3" = "countrycode")
    ) %>% #remove antarctica
    filter(name != "Antarctica")
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = mean_maxwind), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette = "YlOrRd",
    direction = 1,
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = " Max Wind Speed (m/s)"
  ) +
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_maxwind.png", width = 8, height = 5)




ggplot(
  ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
    left_join(
      data_tc %>%
        group_by(countrycode) %>%
        summarise(gdp = mean(loggdp, na.rm = TRUE)),
      by = c("iso_a3" = "countrycode")
    )
) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = gdp), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("darkblue", RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(9, "Spectral")),
    values = scales::rescale(
      c(
        min(data_tc$gdp, na.rm = TRUE),
        max(data_tc$gdp, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    ),
       #labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 0.1), # <-- display as %
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "log GDP pc"
  ) +
  #robinson proj
  coord_sf(crs = "+proj=robin") +
  theme_void() +
      theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.direction = "horizontal"
  )

ggsave("figures/map_gdp.png", width = 8, height = 5)

NA
NA

Time Series

# ── shared theme ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
base_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.background   = element_blank(),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey93", linewidth = 0.4),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 9, color = "grey40"),
    legend.background  = element_blank(),
    legend.key         = element_blank()
  )

col_main   <- "#2b6cb0"   # steel blue
col_light  <- "#90cdf4"
col_pre    <- "#4a90d9"
col_post   <- "#c0392b"
col_p95    <- "#e67e22"
col_p99    <- "#8e44ad"

# ── panel-level summary ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# P2 & P4: annual summaries
annual <- data %>%
  filter(year >= 1970, year <= 2014) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_wind  = mean(maxwind[maxwind > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    max_wind  = max(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_exposed = sum(maxwind > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(top5 = rank(-max_wind) <= 5)

# P4: extreme event counts per year
extreme <- data %>%
  filter(year >= 1970, year <= 2014) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    n_p95  = sum(maxwind_95, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_cat1 = sum(cat1_plus,  na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(n_p95, n_cat1),
               names_to = "threshold", values_to = "n_events") %>%
  mutate(threshold = recode(threshold,
                            n_p95  = "p95 (binary)",
                            n_cat1 = "Cat 1+ (\u226533 m/s)"))

# ── P1: lollipop — top 15 countries by average max wind ─────────────────────
top_countries <- data %>%
  filter(year >= 1970, year <= 2014, maxwind > 0) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  summarise(avg_maxwind = mean(maxwind, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  slice_max(avg_maxwind, n = 15) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = fct_reorder(countrycode, avg_maxwind))

p1 <- ggplot(top_countries, aes(x = avg_maxwind, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = avg_maxwind,
                   y = countrycode, yend = countrycode),
               color = "firebrick", linewidth = 1.1) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "firebrick") +
  labs(
    title    = "A  Countries with highest average max wind speed",
    subtitle = "Top 15 countries, mean over exposed years 1970\u20132014",
    x        = "Avg max wind (m/s)",
    y        = NULL
  ) +
  base_theme

# ── P2: max wind per year as bar chart ──────────────────────────────────────
p2 <- ggplot(annual, aes(x = year, y = max_wind, fill = top5)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.85, width = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = year, y = max_wind), method = "lm", se = FALSE,
              color = col_post, linewidth = 1.1, linetype = "dashed",
              inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_text(
    data = ~ filter(.x, top5),
    aes(label = year, y = max_wind),
    color = "#e63946", fontface = "bold", size = 3.2,
    vjust = -0.5, hjust = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = col_main, "TRUE" = "#e63946"),
                    guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1970, 2014, 8)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.08))) +
  labs(
    title    = "B  Peak max wind speed per year",
    subtitle = "Dashed line = linear trend; red = top 5 years",
    x        = "Year",
    y        = "Max wind speed (m/s)"
  ) +
  base_theme

# ── P3: Kernel density of max wind, pre vs post 1990 ────────────────────────
kde_data <- data %>%
  filter(year >= 1970, year <= 2014, maxwind > 0) %>%
  mutate(period = factor(period, levels = c("Pre-1990", "Post-1990")))

p3 <- ggplot(kde_data, aes(x = maxwind, color = period, fill = period)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.18, linewidth = 1.2, bw = "nrd0") +
  geom_vline(
    data = kde_data %>%
      group_by(period) %>%
      summarise(med = median(maxwind), .groups = "drop"),
    aes(xintercept = med, color = period),
    linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pre-1990"  = col_pre,
                                "Post-1990" = col_post),
                     name = NULL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("Pre-1990"  = col_pre,
                                "Post-1990" = col_post),
                    name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title    = "C  Distribution of max wind speed: Pre- vs Post-1990",
    subtitle = "Kernel density; dashed lines = medians; exposed country-years only",
    x        = "Max wind speed (m/s)",
    y        = "Density"
  ) +
  base_theme +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.78, 0.80))

# ── P4: trend in extreme events per year ────────────────────────────────────
p4 <- ggplot(extreme, aes(x = year, y = n_events,
                           color = threshold, fill = threshold)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_point(size = 1.6, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.1, alpha = 0.15) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("p95 (binary)"    = col_p95,
                                "Cat 1+ (\u226533 m/s)" = col_p99),
                     name = NULL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c("p95 (binary)"    = col_p95,
                                "Cat 1+ (\u226533 m/s)" = col_p99),
                    name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1970, 2014, 8)) +
  labs(
    title    = "D  Extreme TC events per year",
    subtitle = "Linear trends by threshold",
    x        = "Year",
    y        = "# country-years above threshold"
  ) +
  base_theme +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.22, 0.88))

# ── Combine with patchwork ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
wind_descriptives <- (p1 + p2) / (p3 + p4) +
  plot_annotation(
    title   = "Tropical Cyclone Climatology, 1970\u20132014",
    caption = "Source: IBTrACS + PWT. Max wind in m/s. p95/p99 thresholds computed over 1970\u20132014.",
    theme   = theme(
      plot.title   = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.caption = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey50")
    )
  )

ggsave("figures/wind_descriptives.png",
       wind_descriptives, width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 300)

wind_descriptives

data_plot <- data %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(any(maxwind_95 > 0, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  # only ever treated
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(maxwind_95 > 0) %>%                     # only event years
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  mutate(
    first_event = min(year),
    n_events    = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(n_events), first_event) %>%
  mutate(countrycode = factor(countrycode,
                              levels = rev(unique(countrycode))))

# -----------------------------
# 2. RHS labels
# -----------------------------
label_df <- data_plot %>%
  distinct(countrycode, n_events)

max_year <- max(data_plot$year, na.rm = TRUE)
label_x  <- max_year + 2

# -----------------------------
# 3. Split countries into top/bottom halves
# -----------------------------
country_levels <- levels(data_plot$countrycode)
n_countries    <- length(country_levels)
half_point     <- ceiling(n_countries / 2)

top_half       <- country_levels[1:half_point]
bottom_half    <- country_levels[(half_point + 1):n_countries]

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

label_df <- label_df %>%
  mutate(panel = ifelse(countrycode %in% top_half, "Top", "Bottom"))

# -----------------------------
# 4. Plot
# -----------------------------
ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = year, y = countrycode)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +

  # Event count column
  geom_text(
    data = label_df,
    aes(x = label_x, y = countrycode,
        label = n_events),
    hjust = 0,
    size = 3.5,
    color = "firebrick4",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +

  # Facet top/bottom halves
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 2, scales = "free_y") +

  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.20))) +

  labs(x = "Year", y = "Country") +

  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 40, 5.5, 5.5)
  )
ggsave("figures/event_timeline.png", dpi = 300)

# Within-country autocorrelation structure of annual max wind speed.
# Within-country autocorrelation structure of annual max wind speed.

max_lag <- 10

# ── Compute within-country ACF for each lag ──────────────────────────────────
acf_panel <- data %>%
  filter(year >= 1970, year <= 2014, maxwind > 0) %>%
  group_by(countrycode) %>%
  filter(n() >= 10) %>%                         # min observations per country
  arrange(year) %>%
  summarise(
    map_dfr(1:max_lag, function(k) {
      x  <- maxwind
      xk <- lag(maxwind, k)
      ok <- !is.na(x) & !is.na(xk)
      tibble(
        lag = k,
        r   = if (sum(ok) >= 5) cor(x[ok], xk[ok]) else NA_real_
      )
    }),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ── Summary: mean + CI across countries at each lag ──────────────────────────
acf_summary <- acf_panel %>%
  group_by(lag) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_r = mean(r, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_r   = sd(r,   na.rm = TRUE),
    n      = sum(!is.na(r)),
    se_r   = sd_r / sqrt(n),
    lo     = mean_r - 1.96 * se_r,
    hi     = mean_r + 1.96 * se_r,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ── Bartlett 95% significance band (white noise threshold) ───────────────────
n_avg   <- mean(acf_summary$n)
bart_ci <- 1.96 / sqrt(n_avg)

# ── Plot ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig_acf <- ggplot(acf_summary, aes(x = lag)) +

  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.5, color = "grey40") +

  # Country-level ACF as thin transparent lines
  geom_line(
    data  = acf_panel %>% filter(!is.na(r)),
    aes(y = r, group = countrycode),
    color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.25, alpha = 0.15
  ) +

  # CI ribbon
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
              fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.25) +

  # Mean line
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_r),
            color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1.3) +
  geom_point(aes(y = mean_r),
             color = "steelblue", size = 2.8, shape = 21,
             fill = "white", stroke = 1.2) +

  # Significance band on top
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = 0.5, xmax = max_lag + 0.5,
           ymin = -bart_ci, ymax = bart_ci,
           fill = "grey50", alpha = 0.12, color = "grey40",
           linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed") +
  annotate("text",
           x = max_lag, y = bart_ci + 0.015,
           label = "95% white-noise band",
           hjust = 1, size = 3.2, color = "grey40") +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:max_lag) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-0.35, 0.65),
                     breaks = seq(-0.2, 0.6, 0.2)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Within-country autocorrelation of annual max wind speed",
    subtitle = "Thin lines = country-level ACF; thick line = cross-country mean \u00b1 95% CI",
    x        = "Lag (years)",
    y        = "Correlation"
  ) +
  irf_theme

ggsave("figures/acf_maxwind_panel.png",
       fig_acf, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)

fig_acf
